conflicts.name: Storm of Souls
conflicts.oracle_sample: Return all creature cards from your graveyard to the battlefield. Each of them is a 1/1 Spirit with flying in addition to its other types. Exile Storm of Souls.

conflicts.name: Radiant Scrollwielder
conflicts.oracle_sample:
Instant and sorcery spells you control have lifelink.
